title: The Double Jump Mod
description: Balanced double jump mod for both Forge and Fabric!
body:
![Mod Discord URL](https://img.shields.io/discord/870058549177372703?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=red)

_After many user requests, I am beginning to slowly migrate my past projects over to Modrinth from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/derexxd/projects?page=1&sortBy=TotalDownloads) where they've lived for years. This was one of my first mods I coded in high school for college apps!_ 

# Double Jump Mod

Ever wanted to leap over a fencepost?

This mod simply lets you double jump in midair and shallow water. Jumps respect hunger mechanics and will decrease saturation first, and then your hunger. Values and other effects can be configured in a config file.

## Usage & Permissions

You may use this mod in a modpack as long as you do not sell it via any means, you give credit (Linking back to this page), you do not make any changes to the mod aside from config files, and you follow all of the other terms listed in the license.

## Controls

- Default Keybind: `SPACE`
- You can change the key in your control settings.

## Why Use This Mod?

Let’s be honest, there are a ton of movement mods out there.  
If you just want a simple mod that does only double jump, nothing less, this is it.
